title: carduus brutius
intro: Carduus brutius, also known as Prickly Thistle, is a perennial plant belonging to the thistle family, characterized by its tall stem, prickly leaves, and purple flowers. The medicinal properties of Carduus brutius lie in its ability to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and support digestive health. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including liver and gallbladder problems, as well as menstrual cramps and menopausal symptoms, due to its potential health benefits such as antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Herbal preparations of Carduus brutius can be made by infusing the dried flowers and leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by mixing them with other herbs in a tincture or capsule form.
